Sports Venue Layout / 2026

冰球场首层平面
排布汇报

基于真实场馆平面 PDF 抽象的固定分页 HTML 样例，覆盖轴网、功能分区、图纸置入、标注、表格和真实资产路径。

243.75m

grid length

28

axis bays

1:150

plan scale

00

Contents

汇报结构

本页把真实首层平面拆成 Agent 容易理解的汇报语义：轴网、核心冰场、服务配套、流线和 PDF 置入 校核。

01 轴网与场馆骨架

Grid, long-span hall, existing structure.

02 冰场核心与观众区

Rink, stand edge, public circulation.

03 租赁与运营配套

Skate rental, service desk, BOH rooms.

04 图纸置入与指标表

Linked PDF, crop, page scale, area table.

Semantic sections / PDF reference / asset path stress test

01

Grid + Zoning

轴网与功能分区

把首层平面的高密度 CAD 信息抽象为可读分区：使用空间、设备机房、水平交通和未利用区域。标注对象显式声明为 annotation layer。

Public entry band
Rink core zone
Ice rink and spectator edge
Service and equipment rooms
Horizontal circulation space
02

Flow Strategy

观众、运动员与运营流线

Audience

Public arrival and viewing edge stay clear of service traffic.

Athlete

Locker, ice entry and warm-up rooms form a short controlled loop.

Operation

Rental counter, storage and equipment rooms support peak turnover.

Image grid test: raster photo, section SVG, circulation SVG and repeated strategy cards.

03

Drawing Sheet

真实图纸 PDF 置入与裁切

真实首层平面 PDF 作为 linked placed asset，PNG 只用于浏览器预览。这里显式测试 data-id-pdf-page、data-id-crop、data-id-fit 和 drawing layer。

Media crop
Linked PDF

1:150

Plan scale

P1

PDF page

04

Support Program

配套空间与资产路径

这一页用于检查多图网格、对象样式复用，以及中文和空格路径资产。后续 PSD / AI 可替换这些测试资产，但 HTML 语义入口保持一致。

05

Metrics

场馆功能指标与面积表

表格页测试 table / cell style 语义、行列边框、指标数字、图例和正文混排，并覆盖 CSV/XML 数据资产存在性。

Space Area Ratio Note
Ice rink + spectator edge 7,600 sqm 32% Core activity zone
Skate rental + service 2,400 sqm 10% Peak turnover support
Locker + athlete rooms 3,100 sqm 13% Controlled circulation
Temporary operation 4,800 sqm 20% Event and retail zone
Equipment + BOH 5,900 sqm 25% Plant, storage, service

23,800

Program sqm

4

Plan zones

06
